title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: IBM and Red Hat announced Project Lightwell, a $5 billion initiative combining AI-augmented engineers with a trusted security clearinghouse to strengthen open source ecosystem security. The system aims to address growing cyberattacks leveraging open source software that powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
